title: page_length_tool_result
description: Return value of the page_length tool handler.

ok.description: True when the LaTeX compiled and the page fill was measured; false when compilation or measurement failed.

fill.description: Decimal page fill where 1.0 == exactly one page, 0.8 == 80% of one page, 1.25 == 25% into a second page. Present only when ok is true.

log_excerpt.description: Truncated LaTeX compile-log excerpt. Present only when ok is false.

short_bullets.description: Bullets whose final wrapped line is mostly empty — wasted vertical space. Sorted worst-first (smallest last_line_fill first). Empty when no bullets qualify. Present only when ok is true.

lines.description: Number of rendered lines this bullet occupies (>= 2).

last_line_fill.description: Fraction of line width (0–1) consumed by the trailing wrap line — lower means more wasted space.
